messages.maxAccountReached: You have reached the maximum account limit (1 account).
messages.noAccounts:
You don't have any accounts connected yet. Click the button below to add one.
 Be sure you connected your gryphline account on [skport.com](https://skport.com) to fetch your game accounts!
messages.footer: You can link one game account (either Asia or EU/NA server)
